attributes.title: guardian-scores-*
guardian-alerts-*

attributes.description: Cross-model alert counters for the selected time range.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Detection counters
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Detection counters", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "alerts"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.source", "customLabel": "models firing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.entity_id", "customLabel": "entities flagged"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.score", "customLabel": "peak alert score"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 30}}}}

attributes.description: Fused GUARDIAN threat score. Hysteresis bands: elevated at >= 0.40 (recover < 0.25), critical at >= 0.75 (recover < 0.55). The dashed line marks the critical escalation threshold.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Fusion threat score over time
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Fusion threat score over time", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.anomaly_score", "customLabel": "fusion score"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedOpenSearchInterval": true, "scaleMetricValues": false, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "fusion score (0-1)"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "fusion score", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": true, "value": 0.75, "width": 2, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: GUARDIAN threat levels ordered by recency — the top row is the current level.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Current threat level
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Current threat level", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "customLabel": "last seen"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "windows"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.anomaly_score", "customLabel": "peak score"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "score.threat_level.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 3, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing", "customLabel": "threat level"}}], "params": {"perPage": 5, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.description: Which scorer is driving the fused score. Weights: SENTINEL 0.60, ARGUS 0.55, CASSANDRA 0.50.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Model contributions to the fusion score
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Model contributions to the fusion score", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.contributors.argus", "customLabel": "ARGUS"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.contributors.sentinel", "customLabel": "SENTINEL"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.contributors.cassandra", "customLabel": "CASSANDRA"}}, {"id": "4", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "title": {"text": "weighted contribution"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "ARGUS", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "SENTINEL", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "CASSANDRA", "id": "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 2, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Fusion windows over time banded by threat level.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Threat level timeline
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Threat level timeline", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "windows"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedOpenSearchInterval": true, "scaleMetricValues": false, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "score.threat_level.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 3, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "fusion windows"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "windows", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 2, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Every GUARDIAN escalation and recovery, newest first.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Threat level change alerts
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Threat level change alerts", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "customLabel": "at"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.score", "customLabel": "score"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "alert.summary.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 20, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing", "customLabel": "escalation / recovery"}}], "params": {"perPage": 8, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.description: Entities GUARDIAN named as drivers of the fused score.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Top contributing entities
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Top contributing entities", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "fusion windows"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "score.features.top_entities.keyword", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing", "customLabel": "entity"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "fusion windows"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "fusion windows", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 2, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: SENTINEL log-content alerts per interval, stacked by severity.

attributes.description: client_ips with the most SENTINEL log_classification alerts.
attributes.title: SENTINEL W3 — Top offending client IPs
attributes.visState: {"title": "SENTINEL W3 \u2014 Top offending client IPs", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "alerts"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "alert.entity_id", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing", "customLabel": "client_ip"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "alerts"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "alerts", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 2, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Matched attack-template events by family, summed across SENTINEL scoring windows.
attributes.title: SENTINEL W3 — Attack template families (events)
attributes.visState: {"title": "SENTINEL W3 \u2014 Attack template families (events)", "type": "metric", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.template_counts.sqli_probe", "customLabel": "sqli_probe"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.template_counts.path_traversal", "customLabel": "path_traversal"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.template_counts.scanner_probe", "customLabel": "scanner_probe"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "sum", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.template_counts.auth_failure", "customLabel": "auth_failure"}}], "params": {"addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "type": "metric", "metric": {"percentageMode": false, "useRanges": false, "colorSchema": "Green to Red", "metricColorMode": "None", "colorsRange": [{"from": 0, "to": 10000}], "labels": {"show": true}, "invertColors": false, "style": {"bgFill": "#000", "bgColor": false, "labelColor": false, "subText": "", "fontSize": 30}}}}

attributes.description: SENTINEL 60s client_ip windows by verdict (rule_level 2 = malicious, 1 = suspicious, 0 = benign).
attributes.title: SENTINEL W3 — Malicious vs benign windows
attributes.visState: {"title": "SENTINEL W3 \u2014 Malicious vs benign windows", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "windows"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "filters", "schema": "segment", "params": {"filters": [{"input": {"query": "score.features.rule_level >= 2", "language": "kuery"}, "label": "malicious"}, {"input": {"query": "score.features.rule_level: 1", "language": "kuery"}, "label": "suspicious"}, {"input": {"query": "score.features.rule_level: 0", "language": "kuery"}, "label": "benign"}]}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": false, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.description: Highest per-payer CUSUM statistic per interval. The dashed line is the joint alarm threshold h = 6.0 (volume-only alarms need S >= 10).
attributes.title: CASSANDRA W3 — Peak CUSUM drift over time
attributes.visState: {"title": "CASSANDRA W3 \u2014 Peak CUSUM drift over time", "type": "line", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.cusum_volume", "customLabel": "cusum volume S"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.cusum_amount", "customLabel": "cusum amount S"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedOpenSearchInterval": true, "scaleMetricValues": false, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}], "params": {"type": "line", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "CUSUM statistic S"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "cusum volume S", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}, {"show": true, "type": "line", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "cusum amount S", "id": "2"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": true, "value": 6.0, "width": 2, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Per-payer worst volume-CUSUM excursion in the selected range.
attributes.title: CASSANDRA W3 — Payers by peak volume drift
attributes.visState: {"title": "CASSANDRA W3 \u2014 Payers by peak volume drift", "type": "horizontal_bar", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "score.features.cusum_volume", "customLabel": "peak cusum volume"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "score.entity_id", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing", "customLabel": "payer"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "peak CUSUM S"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "normal", "data": {"label": "peak cusum volume", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": false, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 2, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: The evidence CASSANDRA accumulated per payer before alarming: CUSUM peaks, cumulative events/amount over the excursion, and how many consecutive buckets stayed elevated.
attributes.title: CASSANDRA W3 — Cumulative drift evidence
attributes.visState: {"title": "CASSANDRA W3 \u2014 Cumulative drift evidence", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.details.cusum_volume", "customLabel": "peak cusum vol"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.details.cusum_amount", "customLabel": "peak cusum amt"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.details.cumulative_events", "customLabel": "cum. events"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.details.cumulative_amount", "customLabel": "cum. amount"}}, {"id": "5", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.details.buckets_elevated", "customLabel": "buckets elevated"}}, {"id": "6", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "customLabel": "last alert"}}, {"id": "7", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "alert.entity_id", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing", "customLabel": "payer"}}], "params": {"perPage": 8, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.description: Every detector's alert volume on one time axis.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Alerts over time by source
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Alerts over time by source", "type": "histogram", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "alerts"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "date_histogram", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "useNormalizedOpenSearchInterval": true, "scaleMetricValues": false, "interval": "auto", "drop_partials": false, "min_doc_count": 1, "extended_bounds": {}}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "group", "params": {"field": "alert.source", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 6, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "histogram", "grid": {"categoryLines": false}, "categoryAxes": [{"id": "CategoryAxis-1", "type": "category", "position": "bottom", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear"}, "labels": {"show": true, "filter": true, "truncate": 100}, "title": {}}], "valueAxes": [{"id": "ValueAxis-1", "name": "LeftAxis-1", "type": "value", "position": "left", "show": true, "style": {}, "scale": {"type": "linear", "mode": "normal"}, "labels": {"show": true, "rotate": 0, "filter": false, "truncate": 100}, "title": {"text": "alerts"}}], "seriesParams": [{"show": true, "type": "histogram", "mode": "stacked", "data": {"label": "alerts", "id": "1"}, "valueAxis": "ValueAxis-1", "drawLinesBetweenPoints": true, "lineWidth": 2, "interpolate": "linear", "showCircles": true}], "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "times": [], "addTimeMarker": false, "labels": {}, "thresholdLine": {"show": false, "value": 10, "width": 2, "style": "dashed", "color": "#E7664C"}}}

attributes.description: Inner ring: detector. Outer ring: alert type it raised.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Alerts by source and type
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Alerts by source and type", "type": "pie", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "alerts"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "alert.source", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 6, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "segment", "params": {"field": "alert.type", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 10, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing"}}], "params": {"type": "pie", "addTooltip": true, "addLegend": true, "legendPosition": "right", "isDonut": true, "labels": {"show": false, "values": true, "last_level": true, "truncate": 100}}}

attributes.description: Entities ranked by how many independent detectors flagged them. A row with models >= 2 is corroborated cross-model evidence.
attributes.title: Guardian W3 — Corroborated entities (flagged by 2+ models)
attributes.visState: {"title": "Guardian W3 \u2014 Corroborated entities (flagged by 2+ models)", "type": "table", "aggs": [{"id": "1", "enabled": true, "type": "cardinality", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.source", "customLabel": "models"}}, {"id": "2", "enabled": true, "type": "count", "schema": "metric", "params": {"customLabel": "alerts"}}, {"id": "3", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "alert.score", "customLabel": "peak score"}}, {"id": "4", "enabled": true, "type": "max", "schema": "metric", "params": {"field": "@timestamp", "customLabel": "last alert"}}, {"id": "5", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "alert.entity_id", "orderBy": "1", "order": "desc", "size": 15, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing", "customLabel": "entity"}}, {"id": "6", "enabled": true, "type": "terms", "schema": "bucket", "params": {"field": "alert.entity_type", "orderBy": "2", "order": "desc", "size": 3, "otherBucket": false, "otherBucketLabel": "Other", "missingBucket": false, "missingBucketLabel": "Missing", "customLabel": "type"}}], "params": {"perPage": 10, "showPartialRows": false, "showMetricsAtAllLevels": false, "showTotal": false, "totalFunc": "sum", "percentageCol": ""}}

attributes.description: Week-3 SOC single pane: GUARDIAN fusion threat level, plus the SENTINEL, CASSANDRA and ARGUS scorers and their cross-model corroboration.
attributes.title: Guardian Threat Fusion
